name: Guernsey Lake State Forest Campground
description: Rustic state forest campground west of Kalkaska with 35 sites, walk-in campsites, and direct access to the Sand Lakes Quiet Area and nearby trail network.

name: Lake Dubonnet Trail Camp
description: Group-oriented rustic trail camp near Interlochen on the Shore-to-Shore Trail, primarily used by equestrian campers but also useful as a mapped overnight destination.
